ast.name: log
ast.source: Loading the Review plugin v1.6.5.
ast.target: 正在加载 Review 插件 v1.6.5。

ast.name: log
ast.source: The Review Dates plugin has been disabled and unloaded.
ast.target: Review Dates 插件已被禁用并卸载。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Checking for block:
ast.target: 正在检查区块：

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Set Review Date
ast.target: 设置复习日期

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the heading to use for the review section. BE CAREFUL: it must be unique in each daily note.
ast.target: 设置用于复习部分的标题。请注意：它在每个每日笔记中必须是唯一的。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the prefix to use on each new line. E.g., use `- ` for bullets or `- [ ] ` for tasks. **Include the trailing space.**
ast.target: 设置每行新内容使用的前缀。例如，使用 `- ` 表示项目符号，或 `- [ ] ` 表示任务。**请包含尾随空格。**

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the prefix to use for reviewed headings. You probably want this to be a - bulleted list item or an ! embed.
ast.target: 设置用于已复习标题的前缀。您可能希望将其设为 - 项目符号列表项或 ! 嵌入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the prefix used when adding blocks to daily notes with Review. Use e.g., `- [ ] ` to link the block as a task, or `!` to create embeds.
ast.target: 设置使用 Review 将区块添加到每日笔记时使用的前缀。例如，使用 `- [ ] ` 将区块链接为任务，或使用 `!` 创建嵌入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set a default date to be used when no date is entered. Use natural language: "Next Monday", "November 5th", and "tomorrow" all work.
ast.target: 设置未输入日期时使用的默认日期。请使用自然语言：“下周一”、“11月5日”和“明天”都可以。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Review section heading
ast.target: 复习部分标题

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Line prefix
ast.target: 行前缀

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Heading prefix
ast.target: 标题前缀

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Block review line prefix
ast.target: 区块复习行前缀

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Default review date
ast.target: 默认复习日期

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: ## Review
ast.target: ## 复习

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to read the daily note template
ast.target: 读取每日笔记模板失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to create new file.
ast.target: 无法创建新文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The Natural Language Dates plugin was not found. The Review plugin requires the Natural Language Dates plugin. Please install it first and make sure it is enabled before using Review.
ast.target: 未找到 Natural Language Dates 插件。Review 插件需要 Natural Language Dates 插件。请先安装并确保在使用 Review 前已启用它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The Natural Language Dates plugin is not available. Please make sure it is installed and enabled before trying again.
ast.target: Natural Language Dates 插件不可用。请确保在重试前已安装并启用它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You've entered an invalid date (note that "two weeks" will not work, but "in two weeks" will). The note was not set for review. Please try again.
ast.target: 您输入的日期无效（请注意，“两周”无效，但“两周后”有效）。笔记未设置为复习。请重试。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Add this note to a daily note for review
ast.target: 将此笔记添加到每日笔记以进行复习
